text:
**Wire encoding** — `src/fabric/nip29/wire.rs:150-187` (`Nip29WireCodec::encode_event`, `DomainEvent::Status` arm):
```
KIND_STATUS = 30315
tags: ["d", session_id], ["title", title], ["status", "busy"|"idle"], ["host", host]
      + repeated ["h", channel] for each channel in status.channels
      + optional ["slug", agent.slug], ["rel-cwd", rel_cwd], ["expiration", ts] (NIP-40)
content = activity (the live "doing X" text; empty when idle)
``` [...] - **Status (kind:30315) is never actively deleted** — no NIP-09 kind:5 anywhere in `src/`. `session_end.rs:30`: *"Mark the canonical session dead ... Its final published kind:30315 ages off via NIP-40 expiration."* TTL constants: `STATUS_TTL_SECS = 90`, `HEARTBEAT_SECS = 30` (`src/domain.rs:14,17`).
